creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
Updated patch now for automake 1.11.5 and fixes for all known issues can 
be found at:

http://people.FreeBSD.org/~ade/am115.patch
SHA256=
   3087131c3e8b78ab356933b7146cebc5c1d41b3b4f94369e0f35100ba1e57c21

Note that java/eclipse currently fails to compile, however this is 
nothing to do with automake.

-aDe
